data.title: Remove ansible comments from .chezmoidata.yaml
data.description:
## Problem

`.chezmoidata.yaml` still has ansible-era header comments and a leftover path reference:

```yaml
# .chezmoidata.yaml - Managed by Ansible
# DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY - Changes will be overwritten
# Generated by ansible role: chezmoi
# Last updated: 2026-01-24T16:31:48Z
```

And at the bottom:

```yaml
skogai_ansible: /home/skogix/.ansible
```

## Changes needed

* Remove the 3 ansible header comment lines
* Remove `# DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY - Changes will be overwritten` (file is now manually managed)
* Remove the `skogai_ansible` key (no longer relevant)
* Optionally update the header to reflect chezmoi-native management

## Acceptance criteria

* No ansible references remain in `.chezmoidata.yaml`
* File is clearly marked as managed by chezmoi directly
